name: architecture-review
description: Architecture review using Ousterhout deep-module methodology — explore shallow modules, surface candidates, grill design decisions, update domain language inline, and create ADRs for load-bearing choices.

steps.description: Explore the codebase area organically, applying the deletion test to identify shallow modules, tight seams, and untested boundaries.
Present numbered deepening candidates: problem, solution in plain English, benefits in locality and leverage terms. Flag any ADR conflicts.
Walk the design tree with the user: constraints, dependencies, deepened module shape, seam behind the interface, surviving tests. Update CONTEXT.md and offer ADRs inline.
Summarize: candidates accepted, rejected with reasons, ADRs created, CONTEXT.md updates made.
